login.subtitle: Login to manage your account and bookings

validation.otpNumbers: Verification code must contain numbers only

resetPassword.title: Your safety and comfort on every trip
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a new strong password for your account
resetPassword.description: We are here to help you recover your account quickly and easily. Set a strong password to ensure the security of your personal information and account.
resetPassword.encryptionDescription: Your data is protected with modern security standards.
resetPassword.speedDescription: Your password is updated instantly across your account.
resetPassword.requirementUpperLower: At least one uppercase and one lowercase letter

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter

hero.title:
Rent Your Perfect Car
With Absolute Ease in Egypt
hero.subtitle: Choose from hundreds of available cars all over Egypt at competitive prices and exceptional service.

howItWorks.title: How Rento Works?
howItWorks.searchDesc: Choose from categories of cars in your city easily with one click.
howItWorks.bookDesc: Enter your details, choose the appropriate time, and secure your booking with full safety.
howItWorks.driveDesc: Pick up keys from the dealer's location or request delivery to you and start your journey.

featured.subtitleRent: Latest models available for booking now
featured.subtitleBuy: Explore premium vehicles available for purchase

whyUs.title: Why Thousands Choose Rento?
whyUs.subtitle: We don't just offer car rentals; we provide a reliable and enjoyable driving experience, taking care of every detail to guarantee your comfort and safety on every trip.
whyUs.check1: More than 50 pickup points across the country
whyUs.check2: A diverse fleet to suit all budgets
whyUs.check3: Home delivery or airport pickup option
whyUs.safeDesc: Comprehensive insurance coverage on all accidents and damages for all cars.
whyUs.easyDesc: Book your perfect car in less than two minutes via app or website.
whyUs.priceDesc: Complete transparency in pricing without any hidden fees or charges.
whyUs.supportDesc: Our customer service team is ready to assist you at any time.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services
faq.q1: What documents are required for rental?
faq.a1: You need a valid driver's license, national ID (or passport for tourists), and a security deposit (which is fully refundable).
faq.q2: Is airport car delivery service available?
faq.a2: Yes, we offer airport delivery services at Cairo, Alexandria, and other airports. Simply select your terminal during booking.
faq.q3: How is the security deposit refunded?
faq.a3: The deposit is refunded to your card or cash depending on your initial payment method within 3-5 business days after returning the car safely.

footer.desc: Egypt's leading car rental & sales platform. Find the best cars at the prices across all of Egypt.
footer.downloadText: Download the app now for a 10% discount on your first booking
footer.copyright: Made with love in Egypt | © {year} Rento. All rights reserved.

Cars.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, brand, or model...

About.title: Egypt’s modern car rental and marketplace platform
About.description: Rento connects customers with trusted car owners and dealers, making renting and buying cars easier, safer, and more transparent.

trust.title: Trusted Experience
trust.desc: Verified cars, clear pricing, and a smooth booking journey.

cars.title: Rent & Buy
cars.desc: Find cars for short-term rental or purchase from one platform.

users.title: Built for Egypt
users.desc: Designed for Egyptian cities, customers, and local car dealers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Driving the future of mobility in Egypt
mission.desc1: We believe that renting or buying a car should be as simple as booking a flight. No more hidden fees, complicated paperwork, or unreliable dealers.
mission.desc2: By building a transparent, digital-first marketplace, we are empowering thousands of Egyptians to find their perfect ride with confidence and ease.

cta.title: Ready to hit the road?
cta.desc: Join thousands of users who have found their perfect car on Rento.

Contact.title: We’re here to help you
Contact.description: Have a question about renting, selling, or listing a car? Send us a message and our team will contact you.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Our team typically responds within 2-4 hours during regular business hours.
faq.a2: Yes, our main headquarters is in Cairo, but our services cover major cities across Egypt.
faq.q3: Can I contact you on WhatsApp?
faq.a3: Absolutely! You can reach out to our support number via WhatsApp for quicker assistance.
